TEXT.source: NTU Corpus stories for Sakizaya, story: skzyNr-palamal_kaniw
TEXT.citation: Sung, L. M., Lily, I., Hsieh, F., & Lin, Z. (2008). Developing an online corpus of Formosan languages. Taiwan Journal of Linguistics, 6(2.).
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @article{sung2008developing,title={Developing an online corpus of Formosan languages.},author={Sung, Li-May and Lily, I and Hsieh, Fuhui and Lin, Zhemin and others},journal={Taiwan Journal of Linguistics},volume={6},number={2},year={2008}}

S.FORM: kami u Sakizaya a tamdaw i ayaw nu cacay a lasubu izaw ku tulu a bataan a mihcaan nu madebekay kami a mapatay a tamdaw.
S.PHON: kami u sakizaja a tamdaw i ajaw nu ʦaʦaj a r~ɾasubu izaw ku tur~ɾu a bataan a miħʦaan nu madəbəkaj kami a mapataj a tamdaw.
S.FORM: kami u Sakizaya a tamdaw i ayaw nu cacay a lasubu izaw ku tulu a bataan a mihcaan nu madebekay kami a mapatay a tamdaw.
S.PHON: kami u sakizaja a tamdaw i ajaw nu ʦaʦaj a r~ɾasubu izaw ku tur~ɾu a bataan a miħʦaan nu madəbəkaj kami a mapataj a tamdaw.
S.TRANSL: 我們撒奇萊雅族在一百三十年前被消滅.
We Sakizaya was extinct one hundred and thirty years ago.

S.FORM: nayaytu ku ngangan i tini i hekal.
S.PHON: najajtu ku ŋaŋan i tini i ħəkar~ɾ.
S.FORM: nayaytu ku ngangan i tini i hekal.
S.PHON: najajtu ku ŋaŋan i tini i ħəkar~ɾ.
S.TRANSL: 對外名字也不見了.

TRANSL.notes: The name disappeared to the outside (world).

S.TRANSL: The name disappeared to the outside .

S.FORM: saka tiza sa a mikapi i hiya i nu pangcahan ku nikauzip aca nu niyam.
S.PHON: saka tiza sa a mikapi i ħija i nu paŋʦaħan ku nikauzip aʦa nu nijam.
S.FORM: saka tiza sa a mikapi i hiya i nu pangcahan ku nikauzip aca nu niyam.
S.PHON: saka tiza sa a mikapi i ħija i nu paŋʦaħan ku nikauzip aʦa nu nijam.
S.TRANSL: 所以我們就屈身於阿美族部落生存.
So we lived under Amis with grievance.

S.FORM: saka u zumatu haw kuni u mikuwanay tuyni a kanatal saka.
S.PHON: saka u zumatu ħaw kuni u mikuwanaj tujni a kanatar~ɾ saka.
S.FORM: saka u zumatu haw kuni u mikuwanay tuyni a kanatal saka.
S.PHON: saka u zumatu ħaw kuni u mikuwanaj tujni a kanatar~ɾ saka.
S.TRANSL: 所以別人管理這個島了.
So other people took over this island.

S.FORM: palekalen nu niza haw kuni u binacadan.
S.PHON: par~ɾəkar~ɾən nu niza ħaw kuni u binaʦadan.
S.FORM: palekalen nu niza haw kuni u binacadan.
S.PHON: par~ɾəkar~ɾən nu niza ħaw kuni u binaʦadan.

TRANSL.notes: 他(政府)設立原住民.

S.TRANSL: 他 設立原住民.

TRANSL.notes: (The government) established (titles for) indigenous people.

S.TRANSL: established indigenous people.

S.FORM: amin haw nu kasizumazuma tuyni u yuancumin sananay i Taiwan.
S.PHON: amin ħaw nu kasizumazuma tujni u juanʦumin sananaj i taiwan.
S.FORM: amin haw nu kasizumazuma tuyni u yuancumin sananay i Taiwan.
S.PHON: amin ħaw nu kasizumazuma tujni u juanʦumin sananaj i taiwan.
S.TRANSL: 所有在台灣所謂的原住民.
All are the so-called indigenous people in Taiwan.

S.FORM: saka kami saka mulekaltu kami.
S.PHON: saka kami saka mur~ɾəkar~ɾtu kami.
S.FORM: saka kami saka mulekaltu kami.
S.PHON: saka kami saka mur~ɾəkar~ɾtu kami.

TRANSL.notes: 我們就成立了(撒奇萊雅族).

S.TRANSL: 我們就成立了 .
Therefore we were set up.

S.FORM: saupuupusa kami malingatu.
S.PHON: saupuupusa kami mar~ɾiŋatu.
S.FORM: saupuupusa kami malingatu.
S.PHON: saupuupusa kami mar~ɾiŋatu.
S.TRANSL: 我們開始集合.
We started to gather.

S.FORM: kina pinaay haw a a saupu a masasusuwal tu pakainiay haw kami nu sakizaya a kawaw.
S.PHON: kina pinaaj ħaw a a saupu a masasusuwar~ɾ tu pakainiaj ħaw kami nu sakizaja a kawaw.
S.FORM: kina pinaay haw a a saupu a masasusuwal tu pakainiay haw kami nu sakizaya a kawaw.
S.PHON: kina pinaaj ħaw a a saupu a masasusuwar~ɾ tu pakainiaj ħaw kami nu sakizaja a kawaw.
S.TRANSL: 我們多次的集合與討論有關撒奇萊雅族的事情.
We gathered many times and discussed things about Sakizaya.

S.FORM: saka malaheci niyam.
S.PHON: saka mar~ɾaħəʦi nijam.
S.FORM: saka malaheci niyam.
S.PHON: saka mar~ɾaħəʦi nijam.
S.TRANSL: 所以有了成果.
So, there were some achievements.

S.FORM: tya mapacudad.
S.PHON: tja mapaʦudad.
S.FORM: tya mapacudad.
S.PHON: tja mapaʦudad.

TRANSL.notes: (我們)就登記.

S.TRANSL: 就登記.

TRANSL.notes: Then (we) register.

S.TRANSL: Then register.

S.FORM: hepi mapacudad i tini i i yuanminhuei i tini sakakaay joseiin sananay.
S.PHON: ħəpi mapaʦudad i tini i i juanminħuəi i tini sakakaaj josəiin sananaj.
S.FORM: hepi mapacudad i tini i i yuanminhuei i tini sakakaay joseiin sananay.
S.PHON: ħəpi mapaʦudad i tini i i juanminħuəi i tini sakakaaj josəiin sananaj.
S.TRANSL: 就在行政院原民會登記.

TRANSL.notes: (We) registered as Council of Indigenous Peoples, Executive Yuan.

S.TRANSL: registered as Council of Indigenous Peoples, Executive Yuan.

S.FORM: saka namahica saka kapahtu.
S.PHON: saka namaħiʦa saka kapaħtu.
S.FORM: saka namahica saka kapahtu.
S.PHON: saka namaħiʦa saka kapaħtu.
S.TRANSL: 就那樣;就很好.
That's it; that's good.

S.FORM: kyu mapatizeng kami i Taiwan i mahini tu sabaw tulu a minzok sananay a nikauzip.
S.PHON: kju mapatizəŋ kami i taiwan i maħini tu sabaw tur~ɾu a minzok sananaj a nikauzip.
S.FORM: kyu mapatizeng kami i Taiwan i mahini tu sabaw tulu a minzok sananay a nikauzip.
S.PHON: kju mapatizəŋ kami i taiwan i maħini tu sabaw tur~ɾu a minzok sananaj a nikauzip.
S.TRANSL: 所以我們在台灣就成了所謂的第十三族了.
So we were titled as the thirteenth indigenous people in Taiwan.

S.FORM: saka mutizengtu singangantu kita.
S.PHON: saka mutizəŋtu siŋaŋantu kita.
S.FORM: saka mutizengtu singangantu kita.
S.PHON: saka mutizəŋtu siŋaŋantu kita.
S.TRANSL: 我們成立了,也有名字了.

TRANSL.notes: (We) were set up and had our name.

S.TRANSL: were set up and had our name.

S.FORM: saka mi saka limulak amin ku baluzu'.
S.PHON: saka mi saka r~ɾimur~ɾak amin ku bar~ɾuzuʔ~ʡ.
S.FORM: saka mi saka limulak amin ku baluzu'.
S.PHON: saka mi saka r~ɾimur~ɾak amin ku bar~ɾuzuʔ~ʡ.
S.TRANSL: 因此我們都很高興.
Therefore we were very happy.

S.FORM: kakilukilul satu amin haw a manamuh.
S.PHON: kakir~ɾukir~ɾur~ɾ satu amin ħaw a manamuħ.
S.FORM: kakilukilul satu amin haw a manamuh.
S.PHON: kakir~ɾukir~ɾur~ɾ satu amin ħaw a manamuħ.
S.TRANSL: 大家都跟著很高興.
We were very happy.

S.FORM: masaupu matatengitengil.
S.PHON: masaupu matatəŋitəŋir~ɾ.
S.FORM: masaupu matatengitengil.
S.PHON: masaupu matatəŋitəŋir~ɾ.
S.TRANSL: 大家集合開會.
We gathered and had a meeting.

S.FORM: saka sayaway a mazateng niyam uyni tu u palamal sananay a lisin haw nuyni u hiya nuyni u Sakizaya.
S.PHON: saka sajawaj a mazatəŋ nijam ujni tu u par~ɾamar~ɾ sananaj a r~ɾisin ħaw nujni u ħija nujni u sakizaja.
S.FORM: saka sayaway a mazateng niyam uyni tu u palamal sananay a lisin haw nuyni u hiya nuyni u Sakizaya.
S.PHON: saka sajawaj a mazatəŋ nijam ujni tu u par~ɾamar~ɾ sananaj a r~ɾisin ħaw nujni u ħija nujni u sakizaja.
S.TRANSL: 我們最先想到的是撒奇萊雅的火神祭典.
What we firstly thought of was the fire ceremony of Sakizaya.

S.FORM: anu izaw henay ku palamalay i tini i Taiwan haw u nuni u yuancumin sananay sa u Sakizaya.
S.PHON: anu izaw ħənaj ku par~ɾamar~ɾaj i tini i taiwan ħaw u nuni u juanʦumin sananaj sa u sakizaja.
S.FORM: anu izaw henay ku palamalay i tini i Taiwan haw u nuni u yuancumin sananay sa u Sakizaya.
S.PHON: anu izaw ħənaj ku par~ɾamar~ɾaj i tini i taiwan ħaw u nuni u juanʦumin sananaj sa u sakizaja.
S.TRANSL: 在台灣的原住民,如果有火神祭的話,就是撒奇萊雅族.

TRANSL.notes: If the indigenous people in Taiwan have fire ceremony, it is Sakizaya (that has it).

S.TRANSL: If the indigenous people in Taiwan have fire ceremony, it is Sakizaya .

S.FORM: u Sakizaya henay a tamdaw sa palamalay.
S.PHON: u sakizaja ħənaj a tamdaw sa par~ɾamar~ɾaj.
S.FORM: u Sakizaya henay a tamdaw sa palamalay.
S.PHON: u sakizaja ħənaj a tamdaw sa par~ɾamar~ɾaj.
S.TRANSL: 撒奇萊雅就是點火的人.

TRANSL.notes: Sakizaya (means) the people who light a fire.

S.TRANSL: Sakizaya the people who light a fire.

S.FORM: sa u mahizaaytu.
S.PHON: sa u maħizaajtu.
S.FORM: sa u mahizaaytu.
S.PHON: sa u maħizaajtu.
S.TRANSL: 就是這樣.
That's it.

W.TRANSL: 主焦-這樣-表事實=完成貌

S.FORM: zay han uyni u lamal haw ku saka tebek a mapatay.
S.PHON: zaj ħan ujni u r~ɾamar~ɾ ħaw ku saka təbək a mapataj.
S.FORM: zay han uyni u lamal haw ku saka tebek a mapatay.
S.PHON: zaj ħan ujni u r~ɾamar~ɾ ħaw ku saka təbək a mapataj.

TRANSL.notes: (撒奇萊雅)因為火而毀滅.

S.TRANSL: 因為火而毀滅.

TRANSL.notes: (Sakizaya) was destroyed because of fire.

S.TRANSL: was destroyed because of fire.

S.FORM: aynay' ku ngangan nu sakizaya.
S.PHON: ajnajʔ~ʡ ku ŋaŋan nu sakizaja.
S.FORM: aynay' ku ngangan nu sakizaya.
S.PHON: ajnajʔ~ʡ ku ŋaŋan nu sakizaja.
S.TRANSL: 撒奇萊雅就沒有名字.
Sakizaya did not have its name.

S.FORM: nu nituduhan haw nu.
S.PHON: nu nituduħan ħaw nu.
S.FORM: nu nituduhan haw nu.
S.PHON: nu nituduħan ħaw nu.
S.TRANSL: 燒了.

TRANSL.notes: (It) burned.

S.TRANSL: burned.

S.FORM: nika balcawaw atu ni u gungdong hananay a hulam nu nituduhan sa ku niyazu'.
S.PHON: nika bar~ɾʦawaw atu ni u guŋdoŋ ħananaj a ħur~ɾam nu nituduħan sa ku nijazuʔ~ʡ.
S.FORM: nika balcawaw atu ni u gungdong hananay a hulam nu nituduhan sa ku niyazu'.
S.PHON: nika bar~ɾʦawaw atu ni u guŋdoŋ ħananaj a ħur~ɾam nu nituduħan sa ku nijazuʔ~ʡ.
S.TRANSL: 燒毀部落裡從廣東來的外省人.
Those who burned the tribe were the Mainland Chinese from Guangdong.

S.FORM: kyu mabulaw talacu wa kuni u sakizaya.
S.PHON: kju mabur~ɾaw tar~ɾaʦu wa kuni u sakizaja.
S.FORM: kyu mabulaw talacu wa kuni u sakizaya.
S.PHON: kju mabur~ɾaw tar~ɾaʦu wa kuni u sakizaja.
S.TRANSL: 於是撒奇萊雅人就搬家了.
So Sakizaya moved away.

S.FORM: saka cacay a mihca ayza haw izawtu haw kuni ka palamal nu Sakizaya.
S.PHON: saka ʦaʦaj a miħʦa ajza ħaw izawtu ħaw kuni ka par~ɾamar~ɾ nu sakizaja.
S.FORM: saka cacay a mihca ayza haw izawtu haw kuni ka palamal nu Sakizaya.
S.PHON: saka ʦaʦaj a miħʦa ajza ħaw izawtu ħaw kuni ka par~ɾamar~ɾ nu sakizaja.

TRANSL.notes: (正名)一年後,才有火神祭.

S.TRANSL: 一年後,才有火神祭.

TRANSL.notes: After one year (that we proclaimed our identity), there is a fire ceremony.

S.TRANSL: After one year , there is a fire ceremony.

S.FORM: u tudung nu piza teng niyam tu nikauzip niyam tu nikapitu tuduh han katuduh aca nikauzip niyam.
S.PHON: u tuduŋ nu piza təŋ nijam tu nikauzip nijam tu nikapitu tuduħ ħan katuduħ aʦa nikauzip nijam.
S.FORM: u tudung nu piza teng niyam tu nikauzip niyam tu nikapitu tuduh han katuduh aca nikauzip niyam.
S.PHON: u tuduŋ nu piza təŋ nijam tu nikauzip nijam tu nikapitu tuduħ ħan katuduħ aʦa nikauzip nijam.

TRANSL.notes: (火神祭)相當於紀念我們的部落被燒及其被燒死的人.

S.TRANSL: 相當於紀念我們的部落被燒及其被燒死的人.
The fire ceremony is to commemorate the event that our tribe was destroyed by conflagration and the people who were burned to death.

S.FORM: saka u mapatayay i tawya henay saka katu ud ku mapatayay a nu Sakizaya a nu uyni da da haw u talaayaway ku uzip u sEnEng saka makatulu a malebut.
S.PHON: saka u mapatajaj i tawja ħənaj saka katu ud ku mapatajaj a nu sakizaja a nu ujni da da ħaw u tar~ɾaajawaj ku uzip u sənəŋ saka makatur~ɾu a mar~ɾəbut.
S.FORM: saka u mapatayay i tawya henay saka katu ud ku mapatayay a nu Sakizaya a nu uyni da da haw u talaayaway ku uzip u sEnEng saka makatulu a malebut.
S.PHON: saka u mapatajaj i tawja ħənaj saka katu ud ku mapatajaj a nu sakizaja a nu ujni da da ħaw u tar~ɾaajawaj ku uzip u sənəŋ saka makatur~ɾu a mar~ɾəbut.
S.TRANSL: 當時撒奇萊雅有許多人死亡,光年輕人就有3000人.
There were many casualties of Sakizaya at that time, up to three thousand young people.

S.FORM: makatukuh lima a malebut ku mapatayay.
S.PHON: makatukuħ r~ɾima a mar~ɾəbut ku mapatajaj.
S.FORM: makatukuh lima a malebut ku mapatayay.
S.PHON: makatukuħ r~ɾima a mar~ɾəbut ku mapatajaj.
S.TRANSL: 而死亡總數到達5000人.
And the number of dead people amounted to five thousand people

S.FORM: sa i tawya haw nika u kamu tu a makatukuh i tini ya wawa saka malalum ku baluzu' isaw a misimsim sa kyu.
S.PHON: sa i tawja ħaw nika u kamu tu a makatukuħ i tini ja wawa saka mar~ɾar~ɾum ku bar~ɾuzuʔ~ʡ isaw a misimsim sa kju.
S.FORM: sa i tawya haw nika u kamu tu a makatukuh i tini ya wawa saka malalum ku baluzu' isaw a misimsim sa kyu.
S.PHON: sa i tawja ħaw nika u kamu tu a makatukuħ i tini ja wawa saka mar~ɾar~ɾum ku bar~ɾuzuʔ~ʡ isaw a misimsim sa kju.
S.TRANSL: 說到這裡、想到這裡,孩子就傷心.
When I mentioned and thought of this, children could not help but be sad.

S.FORM: saice langsa kami yu mahini haw a patizeng haw tuni u Sakizaya.
S.PHON: saiʦə r~ɾaŋsa kami ju maħini ħaw a patizəŋ ħaw tuni u sakizaja.
S.FORM: saice langsa kami yu mahini haw a patizeng haw tuni u Sakizaya.
S.PHON: saiʦə r~ɾaŋsa kami ju maħini ħaw a patizəŋ ħaw tuni u sakizaja.
S.TRANSL: 因為這樣,我們就很努力成立撒奇萊雅族.
Because of this, we worked hard to establish Sakizaya.

S.FORM: saka uyni tabakiay a lisin nu Sakizaya uyni tu palamal sananay.
S.PHON: saka ujni tabakiaj a r~ɾisin nu sakizaja ujni tu par~ɾamar~ɾ sananaj.
S.FORM: saka uyni tabakiay a lisin nu Sakizaya uyni tu palamal sananay.
S.PHON: saka ujni tabakiaj a r~ɾisin nu sakizaja ujni tu par~ɾamar~ɾ sananaj.
S.TRANSL: 撒奇萊雅最大的祭典就是火神祭.
The biggest ceremony of Sakizaya is the fire ceremony.

S.FORM: u pizatengtu kuyni haw tunu lalumtu hawtu.
S.PHON: u pizatəŋtu kujni ħaw tunu r~ɾar~ɾumtu ħawtu.
S.FORM: u pizatengtu kuyni haw tunu lalumtu hawtu.
S.PHON: u pizatəŋtu kujni ħaw tunu r~ɾar~ɾumtu ħawtu.
S.TRANSL: 想到令人傷心的事.

TRANSL.notes: (I) thought of the sad things.

S.TRANSL: thought of the sad things.

S.FORM: u u kinEn hawtu mapatayay amin a tamdaw.
S.PHON: u u kinən ħawtu mapatajaj amin a tamdaw.
S.FORM: u u kinEn hawtu mapatayay amin a tamdaw.
S.PHON: u u kinən ħawtu mapatajaj amin a tamdaw.
S.TRANSL: 紀念所有死掉的人.

TRANSL.notes: (It) commemorated the dead.

S.TRANSL: commemorated the dead.

S.FORM: saka ina kawaw tuyni u mis palamal sananay sa.
S.PHON: saka ina kawaw tujni u mis par~ɾamar~ɾ sananaj sa.
S.FORM: saka ina kawaw tuyni u mis palamal sananay sa.
S.PHON: saka ina kawaw tujni u mis par~ɾamar~ɾ sananaj sa.
S.TRANSL: 這個所謂的火神祭.
This is what we called fire ceremony.

S.FORM: tatenga' saayaway izawtu kuyni haw sitatudung ay a babalaki u mikeliday.
S.PHON: tatəŋaʔ~ʡ saajawaj izawtu kujni ħaw sitatuduŋ aj a babar~ɾaki u mikər~ɾidaj.
S.FORM: tatenga' saayaway izawtu kuyni haw sitatudung ay a babalaki u mikeliday.
S.PHON: tatəŋaʔ~ʡ saajawaj izawtu kujni ħaw sitatuduŋ aj a babar~ɾaki u mikər~ɾidaj.
S.TRANSL: 有一位老人家負責當帶領.
There was an old man, who took the responsibility and was a leader.

S.FORM: anu malingatutu a misalamal.
S.PHON: anu mar~ɾiŋatutu a misar~ɾamar~ɾ.
S.FORM: anu malingatutu a misalamal.
S.PHON: anu mar~ɾiŋatutu a misar~ɾamar~ɾ.

TRANSL.notes: (他)開始點火.

S.TRANSL: 開始點火.

TRANSL.notes: (He) started to light a fire.

S.TRANSL: started to light a fire.

S.FORM: saka u babalaki tu saka cinza ku mibetikay.
S.PHON: saka u babar~ɾaki tu saka ʦinza ku mibətikaj.
S.FORM: saka u babalaki tu saka cinza ku mibetikay.
S.PHON: saka u babar~ɾaki tu saka ʦinza ku mibətikaj.
S.TRANSL: 老人家是用手沾酒再灑的人.
The elder man was the one who dipped wine with his finger and sprayed.

W.TRANSL: 主焦-用手沾酒再灑-名物化

S.FORM: tya a misasuwal cinza hawtu ca'ay kamelaw a dietu.
S.PHON: tja a misasuwar~ɾ ʦinza ħawtu ʦaʔ~ʡaj kamər~ɾaw a diətu.
S.FORM: tya a misasuwal cinza hawtu ca'ay kamelaw a dietu.
S.PHON: tja a misasuwar~ɾ ʦinza ħawtu ʦaʔ~ʡaj kamər~ɾaw a diətu.

TRANSL.notes: 然後就跟看不見的(鬼神)講話.

S.TRANSL: 然後就跟看不見的 講話.

TRANSL.notes: Then (he) talked to the spirits, which were unseen.

S.TRANSL: Then talked to the spirits, which were unseen.

S.FORM: tya kilul satu uyni tu u mipadangay.
S.PHON: tja kir~ɾur~ɾ satu ujni tu u mipadaŋaj.
S.FORM: tya kilul satu uyni tu u mipadangay.
S.PHON: tja kir~ɾur~ɾ satu ujni tu u mipadaŋaj.
S.TRANSL: 接著的是幫忙的人.
Next was the one who helped.

S.FORM: haw tuyni u mikeliday a mibetik.
S.PHON: ħaw tujni u mikər~ɾidaj a mibətik.
S.FORM: haw tuyni u mikeliday a mibetik.
S.PHON: ħaw tujni u mikər~ɾidaj a mibətik.
S.TRANSL: 帶領的人用手沾酒再灑.
The leader was the one who dipped wine with his finger and sprayed.

S.FORM: haw a mitaliyuk haw tuyni u nipipazengan tuyni u bila' anu epahtu anu uyni tu u tunuz uyni tu haw u titi.

The yellow color symbolizes brightness, the Sun.
